questions.explanation: World Brain Tumor Day is observed on June 8 to spread awareness and educate people about brain tumors.

questions.q: When is World Crocodile Day observed?
questions.urdu: مگرمچھ کا عالمی دن کب منایا جاتا ہے؟
questions.explanation: World Crocodile Day is an annual global event observed every June 17 dedicated to raising awareness about the conservation of crocodilians (including crocodiles, alligators, caimans, and gharials) and their vital wetland habitats.
